content_body: Cadence Ridge was just one of the most beautiful places we have ever stayed. It was quiet, secluded, easy to locate, and has long range mountain views with lots of parking, a huge kitchen... I could go on and on. We loved all of the large bedrooms with beautiful bathrooms. The extra care that went into labeling all of the light switches and drawers within the kitchen are one of those over the top considerations that make a world of difference. It’s things like labels that set this rental apart from the hundreds other rentals we’ve done over the years. We will absolutely be back.
title: Best Rental We've Ever Stayed In
